title: 3 Dividend Stocks to Buy on Sale
text: Falling share prices have boosted the yields of these three dividend stocks.

title: The 10 Best Dividend Stocks of All Time
text: Any discussion regarding the best dividend stocks of all time often starts with the Dividend Aristocrats. They are S&P 500 companies that have increased their annual dividend payment for at least 25 consecutive years.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For November 2022
text: NOBL fell 9.15% in September, which brings the Funds return for the year to a loss of 17.47%. Thus far this month, through October 24th, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 6.04%, bringing its year-to-date return to -12.49%.

title: Dividend Champions To Buy, Sell And Hold, Part 3
text: Dividend Champions are a great list of stocks to study for long-term investment options. Five years ago, I wrote a series of articles in which I reviewed Dividend Champions from specific industries to determine which stocks are buys, sells, or holds.

title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates
text: Sherwin-Williams' (SHW) Q3 top line were driven by higher selling prices in all segments and higher architectural sales volumes in the Americas Group.

title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 8.85% and 4.13%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Sherwin-Williams stock rallies more than 4% after profit and sales beats, amid raised prices and improved margins
text: Shares of Sherwin-Williams Co. SHW, +2.27% ran up 4.5% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the paint and coatings company reported third-quarter profit and record sales that comfortably beat expectations, boosted by price increases and improved margins. Net income rose to $685.1 million, or $2.62 a share, from $502.2 million, or $1.88 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: 7 Blue-Chip Stocks to Sell Before It's Too Late
text: As the bear market rages on, many investors have turned to blue-chip stocks to find safe harbor. Yet, while many blue-chips could add stability and safety to your portfolio (making them stocks to buy), there are plenty of such companies that are best-considered stocks to sell.

title: What's in Store for Sherwin-Williams' (SHW) Q3 Earnings?
text: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) is expected to have benefited from favorable demand in domestic markets in the third quarter.

title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) to Buy Industria Chimica Adriatica
text: The ICA acquisition provides Sherwin-Williams (SHW) with innovative waterborne and solvent liquid coatings technology.
